## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Security

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g., Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + tests at 100% coverage + web-ext lint)
- [ ] Tests cover the new behaviour (the coverage threshold will fail CI otherwise)
- [ ] If this PR adds a new LLM provider, [docs/PROVIDERS.md](../docs/PROVIDERS.md) is updated
- [ ] If this PR changes permissions, [docs/AMO_REVIEW.md](../docs/AMO_REVIEW.md) is updated
- [ ] If this PR changes the threat surface, [docs/THREAT_MODEL.md](../docs/THREAT_MODEL.md) is updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (dev-only is fine)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code; `console.warn`/`console.error` only for genuine issues
